510218973.title: Philips HTS5583/98, Double Bass Sound, 3D Blu-ray, 5.1 Home theater
510218973.detail_text: Touch panel for intuitive playback and volume control Intuitive touch panel controls allows you to control the volume as well as other playback options by simply pressing the touch sensitive controls on the front panel. Wireless rear speakers option for clutter free placement Wireless rear speakers give you scalability and mobility in speaker placement. Developed using interference-free technology, wireless speakers provide full surround sound without unsightly wire connections. Full HD 3D Blu-ray for a truly immersive 3D movie experience Be enthralled by 3D movies in your own living room on a Full HD 3D TV. Active 3D uses the latest generation of fast switching displays for real life depth and realism in full 1080x1920 HD resolution. By watching these images through special glasses with right and left lenses that are timed to open and close in synchrony with alternating images, the full HD 3D viewing experience is created in your home cinema. Premium 3D movie releases on Blu-ray offer a wide, high quality selection of content. Blu-ray also delivers uncompressed surround sound for an unbelievably real audio experience. HDMI Hub to connect HDMI devices for great sound and picture HDMI Hub provides additional HDMI ports to allow you to connect other devices such as your game console or HD set-top box to your home theater conveniently. By connecting your devices through the HDMI Hub, you can enjoy high-definition sound and picture for all your entertainment. Smart TV to enjoy online services & access multimedia on TV Philips home theater & Blu-ray player with Smart TV offer you an array of enhanced features, including Net TV, SimplyShare & MyRemote. Net TV brings a wide range of online information & entertainment to your TV for services like video-on-demand. With SimplyShare, you can access photos, music & movies stored on your PC from the comfort of your couch. You can also use your smartphone/tablet to control your home theater via Philips MyRemote app. Powerful speakers with double basspipes for great sound Powerful speakers with a bass-reflex system and double basspipes enhance the lower frequencies and deliver rock-solid, deep bass sounds. You'll be able to hear the lowest murmur or the deepest roar. Dolby TrueHD and DTS-HD for high fidelity surround sound Dolby TrueHD and DTS-HD Master Audio Essential deliver the finest sound from your Blu-ray Discs. Audio reproduced is virtually indistinguishable from the studio master, so you hear what the creators intended for you to hear. Dolby TrueHD and DTS-HD Master Audio Essential complete your high definition entertainment experience. 1000W RMS power delivers great sound for movies and music Technical Specifications Sound Sound Enhancement Auto Volume Leveler Dolby Digital Prologic II Double Bass Sound FullSound Night Mode Surround Plus Treble and Bass Control Sound System Dolby Digital 5.1 Dolby Digital Plus Dolby True HD DTS Digital Surround DTS-HD High Resolution Audio DTS-HD Master Audio Subwoofer output power 166 W Equalizer settings Gaming Movie Music News Original Center speaker output power 166 W Tallboy speaker output power 2 x 166 W Satellite speaker output power 2 x 166W Total Power RMS @ 30% THD 1000 W Loudspeakers Loudspeaker types 1 x Centre speaker 2 x Satellite speakers 2 x Tallboy speakers Center speaker drivers 1 x 3" Full range woofer Satellite speaker freq range 150-20k Hz Satellite speaker impedance 4 ohm Subwoofer freq range 20-150 Hz Center speaker impedance 4 ohm Subwoofer driver 1 x 6.5" woofer Subwoofer type Passive Center speaker freq range 150-20k Hz Drivers per Satellite speaker 1 x 3" Full range woofer Subwoofer impedance 4 ohm Drivers per Tallboy speaker 1 x 3" Full range woofer Tallboy speaker freq range 150-20k Hz Tallboy speaker impedance 4 ohm
510218973.detail_html:
Touch panel for intuitive playback and volume control

Intuitive touch panel controls allows you to control the volume as well as other playback options by simply pressing the touch sensitive controls on the front panel.

Wireless rear speakers option for clutter free placement

Wireless rear speakers give you scalability and mobility in speaker placement. Developed using interference-free technology, wireless speakers provide full surround sound without unsightly wire connections.

Full HD 3D Blu-ray for a truly immersive 3D movie experience

Be enthralled by 3D movies in your own living room on a Full HD 3D TV. Active 3D uses the latest generation of fast switching displays for real life depth and realism in full 1080x1920 HD resolution. By watching these images through special glasses with right and left lenses that are timed to open and close in synchrony with alternating images, the full HD 3D viewing experience is created in your home cinema. Premium 3D movie releases on Blu-ray offer a wide, high quality selection of content. Blu-ray also delivers uncompressed surround sound for an unbelievably real audio experience.

HDMI Hub to connect HDMI devices for great sound and picture

HDMI Hub provides additional HDMI ports to allow you to connect other devices such as your game console or HD set-top box to your home theater conveniently. By connecting your devices through the HDMI Hub, you can enjoy high-definition sound and picture for all your entertainment.

Smart TV to enjoy online services & access multimedia on TV

Philips home theater & Blu-ray player with Smart TV offer you an array of enhanced features, including Net TV, SimplyShare & MyRemote. Net TV brings a wide range of online information & entertainment to your TV for services like video-on-demand. With SimplyShare, you can access photos, music & movies stored on your PC from the comfort of your couch. You can also use your smartphone/tablet to control your home theater via Philips MyRemote app.

Powerful speakers with double basspipes for great sound

Powerful speakers with a bass-reflex system and double basspipes enhance the lower frequencies and deliver rock-solid, deep bass sounds. You'll be able to hear the lowest murmur or the deepest roar.

Dolby TrueHD and DTS-HD for high fidelity surround sound

Dolby TrueHD and DTS-HD Master Audio Essential deliver the finest sound from your Blu-ray Discs. Audio reproduced is virtually indistinguishable from the studio master, so you hear what the creators intended for you to hear. Dolby TrueHD and DTS-HD Master Audio Essential complete your high definition entertainment experience.

1000W RMS power delivers great sound for movies and music

aiTexts: This 800W mini HiFi digital Bluetooth audio power amplifier delivers clear, powerful stereo sound with low distortion.
Supports multiple input modes including Bluetooth 5.0, TF card, AUX, U disk, and FM stereo radio for versatile playback.
Features treble, bass, and volume controls for easy sound customization plus a remote control for convenient operation.
Dual 2.0 channel outputs with 90W+90W peak power, auto voltage switching, and compatibility with 110V/220V for home or car use.
Compact and lightweight design minimizes heat, making it suitable for varied environments.

3393294222.title: Portable CD Player Wall Mountable Bluetooth Home Audio Box with Remote Control FM Radio Built-in HiFi Speaker MP3
3393294222.detail_text: 【Multi-Function CD Player】 This compact home CD player is a versatile entertainment device that delivers high-quality audio in multiple formats. It supports CD, CD-R, CD-RW, MP3, and WMA, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of discs. Additionally, it functions as an FM radio, Bluetooth Hi-Fi speaker, TF card music player, USB flash drive player, and a mini home speaker. Whether you want to enjoy your classic CDs or stream music from a Bluetooth-enabled device, this all-in-one player meets your needs. 【Advanced Bluetooth 5.1 Connectivity】 With the latest Bluetooth 5.1 technology, this portable CD player ensures a more stable connection, wider signal range, and faster transmission speed. It can seamlessly pair with smartphones, tablets, and other Bluetooth-enabled devices. The built-in dual Hi-Fi speakers provide rich, immersive sound, making it a great choice for both personal and shared listening experiences. 【Wall-Mountable Design for Space Efficiency】 This CD player features a wall-mountable design, allowing you to save space while enhancing your home décor. It comes with all the necessary mounting accessories, making installation quick and easy. Additionally, it includes a remote control with a 5m operating range, enabling you to adjust playback settings conveniently. The timer function allows you to set automatic playtimes for added convenience. 【Modern Aesthetic with LCD Display】 This plug-and-play CD player requires no waiting—just connect it to a power source and start enjoying your favorite tunes instantly. The LCD display provides clear information about the playback status, while the front dust cover protects your discs from dirt and damage, ensuring longevity and high-quality performance. 【Perfect Gift for Music Lovers】 With its sleek white design, this CD player is ideal for various occasions, including yoga sessions, gym workouts, home parties, language learning, early childhood education, and prenatal music therapy. It makes a thoughtful gift for kids, seniors, parents, friends, and expectant mothers who appreciate quality audio entertainment. 【Technical Specifications】 Control: Cable pull switch, remote control Display: LCD eye-protection screen Audio Formats Supported: CD, CD-R, CD-RW, MP3, WMA Connectivity: Bluetooth 5.1, USB-Flash read/play, TF card slot Playback Features: Track loop mode, full disc loop, A-B repeat mode Additional Features: FM radio, timing function 【Package Contents】 1 x Remote Control 1 x Wall Plate 1 x Table Stand 1 x Set of Screws 1 x User Guide 1 x AV Cable 1 x USB Adapter 1 x HDMI Cable 1 x Dust Cover
3393294222.detail_html:
【Multi-Function CD Player】



This compact home CD player is a versatile entertainment device that delivers high-quality audio in multiple formats. It supports CD, CD-R, CD-RW, MP3, and WMA, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of discs. Additionally, it functions as an FM radio, Bluetooth Hi-Fi speaker, TF card music player, USB flash drive player, and a mini home speaker. Whether you want to enjoy your classic CDs or stream music from a Bluetooth-enabled device, this all-in-one player meets your needs.







【Advanced Bluetooth 5.1 Connectivity】



With the latest Bluetooth 5.1 technology, this portable CD player ensures a more stable connection, wider signal range, and faster transmission speed. It can seamlessly pair with smartphones, tablets, and other Bluetooth-enabled devices. The built-in dual Hi-Fi speakers provide rich, immersive sound, making it a great choice for both personal and shared listening experiences.







【Wall-Mountable Design for Space Efficiency】



This CD player features a wall-mountable design, allowing you to save space while enhancing your home décor. It comes with all the necessary mounting accessories, making installation quick and easy. Additionally, it includes a remote control with a 5m operating range, enabling you to adjust playback settings conveniently. The timer function allows you to set automatic playtimes for added convenience.







【Modern Aesthetic with LCD Display】



This plug-and-play CD player requires no waiting—just connect it to a power source and start enjoying your favorite tunes instantly. The LCD display provides clear information about the playback status, while the front dust cover protects your discs from dirt and damage, ensuring longevity and high-quality performance.







【Perfect Gift for Music Lovers】



With its sleek white design, this CD player is ideal for various occasions, including yoga sessions, gym workouts, home parties, language learning, early childhood education, and prenatal music therapy. It makes a thoughtful gift for kids, seniors, parents, friends, and expectant mothers who appreciate quality audio entertainment.







【Technical Specifications】



Control: Cable pull switch, remote control



Display: LCD eye-protection screen



Audio Formats Supported: CD, CD-R, CD-RW, MP3, WMA



Connectivity: Bluetooth 5.1, USB-Flash read/play, TF card slot



Playback Features: Track loop mode, full disc loop, A-B repeat mode



Additional Features: FM radio, timing function







【Package Contents】



1 x Remote Control



1 x Wall Plate



1 x Table Stand



1 x Set of Screws



1 x User Guide



1 x AV Cable



1 x USB Adapter



1 x HDMI Cable



1 x Dust Cover

product.desc:
【Multi-Function CD Player】



This compact home CD player is a versatile entertainment device that delivers high-quality audio in multiple formats. It supports CD, CD-R, CD-RW, MP3, and WMA, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of discs. Additionally, it functions as an FM radio, Bluetooth Hi-Fi speaker, TF card music player, USB flash drive player, and a mini home speaker. Whether you want to enjoy your classic CDs or stream music from a Bluetooth-enabled device, this all-in-one player meets your needs.







【Advanced Bluetooth 5.1 Connectivity】



With the latest Bluetooth 5.1 technology, this portable CD player ensures a more stable connection, wider signal range, and faster transmission speed. It can seamlessly pair with smartphones, tablets, and other Bluetooth-enabled devices. The built-in dual Hi-Fi speakers provide rich, immersive sound, making it a great choice for both personal and shared listening experiences.







【Wall-Mountable Design for Space Efficiency】



This CD player features a wall-mountable design, allowing you to save space while enhancing your home décor. It comes with all the necessary mounting accessories, making installation quick and easy. Additionally, it includes a remote control with a 5m operating range, enabling you to adjust playback settings conveniently. The timer function allows you to set automatic playtimes for added convenience.







【Modern Aesthetic with LCD Display】



This plug-and-play CD player requires no waiting—just connect it to a power source and start enjoying your favorite tunes instantly. The LCD display provides clear information about the playback status, while the front dust cover protects your discs from dirt and damage, ensuring longevity and high-quality performance.







【Perfect Gift for Music Lovers】



With its sleek white design, this CD player is ideal for various occasions, including yoga sessions, gym workouts, home parties, language learning, early childhood education, and prenatal music therapy. It makes a thoughtful gift for kids, seniors, parents, friends, and expectant mothers who appreciate quality audio entertainment.







【Technical Specifications】



Control: Cable pull switch, remote control



Display: LCD eye-protection screen



Audio Formats Supported: CD, CD-R, CD-RW, MP3, WMA



Connectivity: Bluetooth 5.1, USB-Flash read/play, TF card slot



Playback Features: Track loop mode, full disc loop, A-B repeat mode



Additional Features: FM radio, timing function







【Package Contents】



1 x Remote Control



1 x Wall Plate



1 x Table Stand



1 x Set of Screws



1 x User Guide



1 x AV Cable



1 x USB Adapter



1 x HDMI Cable



1 x Dust Cover

3.【Modern Aesthetic with LCD Display】

3539966987.title: TPLINK TAPO C211 PAN/TILT INDOOR HOME SECURITY WI-FI CAMERA | 2K 3MP (2304 x 1296 PX) | TWO-WAY AUDIO | TAPO CAMERA
3539966987.detail_text: 2K 3MP High Definition: Capture every detail inside your home with crystal-clear 2K high definition video with this indoor security camera. Up, Down, All Around: See everything across an entire room or walkway with the 360° horizontal and 114° vertical range pan/tilt field of view. Detection & Instant Notification: Get instant push notifications when motion or a person is detected, subscribe to Tapo care to for baby crying detection. Night Vision up to 30 Ft.: Never miss a thing that goes on, even at night. Precise Motion Tracking: Tracks and follows the subject to keep it within your view to keep an eye on the action. 2-Way Audio: Enables real-time conversational communication through a built-in microphone and speaker. Never truly leave home with the built-in 2-way audio. Privacy Zone: Set customizable block zones to keep certain spaces from being recorded so you never need to worry about personal moments being leaked. Device Sharing: View your Wi-Fi camera feed from two different smart phone devices. Now mom and dad can both see what's happening at home with a single camera. Secure Local or Cloud Storage: Save footage continuously on up to a 512 GB microSD card † or subscribe to Tapo Care for cloud storage. Voice Control: Works with the Google Assistant and Amazon Alexa to free up your hands. Resolution : 2K 3MP (2304 x 1296 px) Angle of View : (H) 360° (V) 114° Day/Night Vision : Night Vision Up to 9M Audio : Two Way Audio External Storage : Up to 512GB Network Standard : 802.11b/g/n .disclaimer>p:last-child {margin: 0 !important;} Gain City Disclaimer We strive to present the product information as accurate as possible by taking information directly from manufacturer's / agent's website. 3539966987.detail_html:
• 2K 3MP High Definition: Capture every detail inside your home with crystal-clear 2K high definition video with this indoor security camera.
  • Up, Down, All Around: See everything across an entire room or walkway with the 360° horizontal and 114° vertical range pan/tilt field of view.
  • Detection & Instant Notification: Get instant push notifications when motion or a person is detected, subscribe to Tapo care to for baby crying detection. 
  • Night Vision up to 30 Ft.: Never miss a thing that goes on, even at night.
  • Precise Motion Tracking: Tracks and follows the subject to keep it within your view to keep an eye on the action.
  • 2-Way Audio: Enables real-time conversational communication through a built-in microphone and speaker. Never truly leave home with the built-in 2-way audio. 
  • Privacy Zone: Set customizable block zones to keep certain spaces from being recorded so you never need to worry about personal moments being leaked.
  • Device Sharing: View your Wi-Fi camera feed from two different smart phone devices. Now mom and dad can both see what's happening at home with a single camera.
  • Secure Local or Cloud Storage: Save footage continuously on up to a 512 GB microSD card† or subscribe to Tapo Care for cloud storage.
  • Voice Control: Works with the Google Assistant and Amazon Alexa to free up your hands.

product.desc:
• 2K 3MP High Definition: Capture every detail inside your home with crystal-clear 2K high definition video with this indoor security camera.
  • Up, Down, All Around: See everything across an entire room or walkway with the 360° horizontal and 114° vertical range pan/tilt field of view.
  • Detection & Instant Notification: Get instant push notifications when motion or a person is detected, subscribe to Tapo care to for baby crying detection. 
  • Night Vision up to 30 Ft.: Never miss a thing that goes on, even at night.
  • Precise Motion Tracking: Tracks and follows the subject to keep it within your view to keep an eye on the action.
  • 2-Way Audio: Enables real-time conversational communication through a built-in microphone and speaker. Never truly leave home with the built-in 2-way audio. 
  • Privacy Zone: Set customizable block zones to keep certain spaces from being recorded so you never need to worry about personal moments being leaked.
  • Device Sharing: View your Wi-Fi camera feed from two different smart phone devices. Now mom and dad can both see what's happening at home with a single camera.
  • Secure Local or Cloud Storage: Save footage continuously on up to a 512 GB microSD card† or subscribe to Tapo Care for cloud storage.
  • Voice Control: Works with the Google Assistant and Amazon Alexa to free up your hands.


  • Resolution: 2K 3MP (2304 x 1296 px)

  • Angle of View: (H) 360° (V) 114°

  • Day/Night Vision: Night Vision Up to 9M

  • Audio: Two Way Audio

  • External Storage: Up to 512GB

  • Network Standard: 802.11b/g/n

Warna disesuaikan dan Gaya





【Sound Absorption Principle 】Most of the harsh noise that occurs in a room is caused by bounce from hard surfaces such as the ceiling and floor. Therefore, the mixing of reverberation and direct sound will produce acoustic turbidity, making listening, recording and communication very difficult and less professional. By installing an acoustic panel in a small space, you can get many benefits from audio processing to design.









  • 【Characteristic】The sound absorption panel is processed by laser drilling, the sound reaches the small holes on the surface, which increases the number and sound is continuously reflected deformed and emitted in the microhole, and the sound absorption and noise reduction effect is exhibited.







  • 【IMPROVED ACOUSTIC QUALITY】: Make Higher Quality Audio and Video Recording - Improving your audio quality instantly by reducing background noise and echo while recording your voice overs, music, interviews, podcasts, or YouTube videos.

  • 【Flame-retardant heat insulation】 The sound absorption panel is made of 100% polyester fiber, and the high-quality flame-retardant material is safe and comfortable to use. The flame-retardant grade: B1, to ensure the safe use of the environment and heat insulation.







  • 【Easy to install】Use double-sided glue or glass glue to enhance the viscosity, If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us, we will provide you with the corresponding services ASAP.







  • 【Improve acoustic quality】 The sound insulation panel has a wide range of applications, suitable for professional studios, recording studios, offices, concert halls, theaters, conference halls, rehearsal rooms, etc. It can eliminate unnecessary sounds and make effective sounds clearer.

Warna disesuaikan dan Gaya





【Sound Absorption Principle 】Most of the harsh noise that occurs in a room is caused by bounce from hard surfaces such as the ceiling and floor. Therefore, the mixing of reverberation and direct sound will produce acoustic turbidity, making listening, recording and communication very difficult and less professional. By installing an acoustic panel in a small space, you can get many benefits from audio processing to design.









  • 【Characteristic】The sound absorption panel is processed by laser drilling, the sound reaches the small holes on the surface, which increases the number and sound is continuously reflected deformed and emitted in the microhole, and the sound absorption and noise reduction effect is exhibited.







  • 【IMPROVED ACOUSTIC QUALITY】: Make Higher Quality Audio and Video Recording - Improving your audio quality instantly by reducing background noise and echo while recording your voice overs, music, interviews, podcasts, or YouTube videos.







  • 【ECO-friendly】 Environmental protection and sound insulation are healthier. 100% polyester fiber is made by high-tech hot pressing, odorless, non-toxic, non-formaldehyde, harmless to the skin, and the polyester fiber material can be recycled and reused.







  • 【Flame-retardant heat insulation】 The sound absorption panel is made of 100% polyester fiber, and the high-quality flame-retardant material is safe and comfortable to use. The flame-retardant grade: B1, to ensure the safe use of the environment and heat insulation.







  • 【Easy to install】Use double-sided glue or glass glue to enhance the viscosity, If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us, we will provide you with the corresponding services ASAP.







  • 【Improve acoustic quality】 The sound insulation panel has a wide range of applications, suitable for professional studios, recording studios, offices, concert halls, theaters, conference halls, rehearsal rooms, etc. It can eliminate unnecessary sounds and make effective sounds clearer.
product.highlights:
【Sound Absorption Principle 】Most of the harsh noise that occurs in a room is caused by bounce from hard surfaces such as the ceiling and floor. Therefore, the mixing of reverberation and direct sound will produce acoustic turbidity, making listening, recording and communication very difficult and less professional. By installing an acoustic panel in a small space, you can get many benefits from audio processing to design.
【Characteristic】The sound absorption panel is processed by laser drilling, the sound reaches the small holes on the surface, which increases the number and sound is continuously reflected deformed and emitted in the microhole, and the sound absorption and noise reduction effect is exhibited.
【IMPROVED ACOUSTIC QUALITY】: Make Higher Quality Audio and Video Recording - Improving your audio quality instantly by reducing background noise and echo while recording your voice overs, music, interviews, podcasts, or YouTube videos.
【ECO-friendly】 Environmental protection and sound insulation are healthier. 100% polyester fiber is made by high-tech hot pressing, odorless, non-toxic, non-formaldehyde, harmless to the skin, and the polyester fiber material can be recycled and reused.
【Flame-retardant heat insulation】 The sound absorption panel is made of 100% polyester fiber, and the high-quality flame-retardant material is safe and comfortable to use. The flame-retardant grade: B1, to ensure the safe use of the environment and heat insulation.
【Easy to install】Use double-sided glue or glass glue to enhance the viscosity, If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us, we will provide you with the corresponding services ASAP.
【Improve acoustic quality】 The sound insulation panel has a wide range of applications, suitable for professional studios, recording studios, offices, concert halls, theaters, conference halls, rehearsal rooms, etc. It can eliminate unnecessary sounds and make effective sounds clearer.

page_json.description: 【Sound Absorption Principle 】Most of the harsh noise that occurs in a room is caused by bounce from hard surfaces such as the ceiling and floor. Therefore, the mixing of reverberation and direct sound will produce acoustic turbidity, making listening, recording and communication very difficult and less professional. By installing an acoustic panel in a small space, you can get many benefits from audio processing to design.【Characteristic】The sound absorption panel is processed by laser drilling, the sound reaches the small holes on the surface, which increases the number and sound is continuously reflected deformed and emitted in the microhole, and the sound absorption and noise reduction effect is exhibited.【IMPROVED ACOUSTIC QUALITY】: Make Higher Quality Audio and Video Recording - Improving your audio quality instantly by reducing background noise and echo while recording your voice overs, music, interviews, podcasts, or YouTube videos.【ECO-friendly】 Environmental protection and sound insulation are healthier. 100% polyester fiber is made by high-tech hot pressing, odorless, non-toxic, non-formaldehyde, harmless to the skin, and the polyester fiber material can be recycled and reused.【Flame-retardant heat insulation】 The sound absorption panel is made of 100% polyester fiber, and the high-quality flame-retardant material is safe and comfortable to use. The flame-retardant grade: B1, to ensure the safe use of the environment and heat insulation.【Easy to install】Use double-sided glue or glass glue to enhance the viscosity, If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us, we will provide you with the corresponding services ASAP.【Improve acoustic quality】 The sound insulation panel has a wide range of applications, suitable for professional studios, recording studios, offices, concert halls, theaters, conference halls, rehearsal rooms, etc. It can eliminate unnecessary sounds and make effective sounds clearer.<html> <head></head> <body>              Warna disesuaikan dan Gaya      【Sound Absorption Principle 】Most of the harsh noise that occurs in a room is caused by bounce from hard surfaces such as the ceiling and floor. Therefore, the mixing of reverberation and direct sound will produce acoustic turbidity, making listening, recording and communication very difficult and less professional. By installing an acoustic panel in a small space, you can get many benefits from audio processing to design.                  【Characteristic】The sound absorption panel is processed by laser drilling, the sound reaches the small holes on the surface, which increases the number and sound is continuously reflected deformed and emitted in the microhole, and the sound absorption and noise reduction effect is exhibited.                    【IMPROVED ACOUSTIC QUALITY】: Make Higher Quality Audio and Video Recording - Improving your audio quality instantly by reducing background noise and echo while recording your voice overs, music, interviews, podcasts, or YouTube videos.                    【ECO-friendly】 Environmental protection and sound insulation are healthier. 100% polyester fiber is made by high-tech hot pressing, odorless, non-toxic, non-formaldehyde, harmless to the skin, and the polyester fiber material can be recycled and reused.                    【Flame-retardant heat insulation】 The sound absorption panel is made of 100% polyester fiber, and the high-quality flame-retardant material is safe and comfortable to use. The flame-retardant grade: B1, to ensure the safe use of the environment and heat insulation.                    【Easy to install】Use double-sided glue or glass glue to enhance the viscosity, If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us, we will provide you with the corresponding services ASAP.                    【Improve acoustic quality】 The sound insulation panel has a wide range of applications, suitable for professional studios, recording studios, offices, concert halls, theaters, conference halls, rehearsal rooms, etc. It can eliminate unnecessary sounds and make effective sounds clearer.           </body></html>

13799576552.title:
Lo-ok
Outdoor Dinner Bell in Cast Iron, Vintage Wall-Mounted Design Featuring Clear Sound for Home and Garden Decor
13799576552.detail_text: Lo-ok Timeless Design with Durable Material: Crafted from robust cast iron, this dinner bell not only adds a rustic charm to your home but also promises durability for daily use. Its classic design makes it a potential heirloom piece, blending seamlessly into various decor styles. Clear and Resonant Sound: Engineered to emit a crisp, far-reaching chime, this bell serves perfectly for calling family to meals or signaling gatherings. Ideal for outdoor settings like gardens or porches, its sound carries well, ensuring it is heard clearly and pleasantly. Elegant Vintage Aesthetic: Featuring an Retro-inspired finish, this wall-mounted bell enhances your space with its traditional look. Whether placed indoors or outdoors, it complements your decor with its timeless appeal, making it a versatile addition to your home. Versatile Use for Various Occasions: This bell is not limited to dinner calls but is also perfect for parties, family gatherings, church events, or as a shop bell. Its versatility makes it an essential accessory for any event that requires a charming and effective call to attention. Easy Installation with Included Mounting Hardware: The bell comes with all necessary screws and anchors for quick setup. Designed for effortless placement, you can hang it on any wall, porch, or garden post, ensuring it is always within reach and ready to use. Color: As Shown Material: Cast Iron Package Contents: 1* vintage doorbell
13799576552.detail_html:
Lo-ok
Timeless Design with Durable Material: Crafted from robust cast iron, this dinner bell not only adds a rustic charm to your home but also promises durability for daily use. Its classic design makes it a potential heirloom piece, blending seamlessly into various decor styles.
Clear and Resonant Sound: Engineered to emit a crisp, far-reaching chime, this bell serves perfectly for calling family to meals or signaling gatherings. Ideal for outdoor settings like gardens or porches, its sound carries well, ensuring it is heard clearly and pleasantly.
Elegant Vintage Aesthetic: Featuring an Retro-inspired finish, this wall-mounted bell enhances your space with its traditional look. Whether placed indoors or outdoors, it complements your decor with its timeless appeal, making it a versatile addition to your home.
Versatile Use for Various Occasions: This bell is not limited to dinner calls but is also perfect for parties, family gatherings, church events, or as a shop bell. Its versatility makes it an essential accessory for any event that requires a charming and effective call to attention.
Easy Installation with Included Mounting Hardware: The bell comes with all necessary screws and anchors for quick setup. Designed for effortless placement, you can hang it on any wall, porch, or garden post, ensuring it is always within reach and ready to use.

Color: As Shown
Material: Cast Iron

Package Contents:
1* vintage doorbell

Clear and Resonant Sound: Engineered to emit a crisp, far-reaching chime, this bell serves perfectly for calling family to meals or signaling gatherings. Ideal for outdoor settings like gardens or porches, its sound carries well, ensuring it is heard clearly and pleasantly. Elegant Vintage Aesthetic: Featuring an Retro-inspired finish, this wall-mounted bell enhances your space with its traditional look. Whether placed indoors or outdoors, it complements your decor with its timeless appeal, making it a versatile addition to your home. Versatile Use for Various Occasions: This bell is not limited to dinner calls but is also perfect for parties, family gatherings, church events, or as a shop bell. Its versatility makes it an essential accessory for any event that requires a charming and effective call to attention. Easy Installation with Included Mounting Hardware: The bell comes with all necessary screws and anchors for quick setup. Designed for effortless placement, you can hang it on any wall, porch, or garden post, ensuring it is always within reach and ready to use. Color: As Shown Material: Cast Iron Package Contents: 1* vintage doorbell
